nasb.text: For behold, the Lord God of hosts is going to remove from Jerusalem and Judah Both supply and support, the whole supply of bread And the whole supply of water;

esv.text: For behold, the Lord God of hosts is taking away from Jerusalem and from Judah support and supply, all support of bread, and all support of water;

cnv.text: 看哪！主萬軍之耶和華，快要從耶路撒冷和猶大， 除掉人所倚靠的和所倚賴的，就是眾人所倚靠的糧， 眾人所倚賴的水；

ccb.text: 主——万军之耶和华要从耶路撒冷和犹大拿去众人倚靠的一切：粮食、水、

csbs.text: 看哪！主万军之耶和华快要从耶路撒冷和犹大 除掉人所依靠和所依赖的， 就是所依靠的一切粮和一切水；
